input.headline: Giants’ Abdul Carter is rushing to get past his public punishment

raw.headline: Giants’ Abdul Carter is rushing to get past his public punishment

winner: Why did Giants' Abdul Carter rush to get past his public punishment? Because he was determined to outrun his time-out!

candidates.text: Why did the giant hurry to catch up with his public punishment? Because he didn't want to be tardy for his carceration.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat forced with the word 'carceration' and lacks a clear connection to the headline's context."}

candidates.text: Why did Giants' Abdul Carter rush to get past his public punishment? Because he was determined to outrun his time-out!
